tool_args.content:
import logging
import os

def configure_logging():
    level = os.getenv("LOG_LEVEL", "INFO").upper()
    logging.basicConfig(
        level=level,
        format="%(asctime)s %(levelname)s %(name)s %(message)s"
    )
